zh.Rescobie, Angus, Scotland: 英國蘇格蘭安格斯雷斯可比
zh.lifeSummary: 當Hextilda fitz Andlaw of Perth於1040年出生在蘇格蘭培爾培斯時，她的父親Andlaw Fitz Hemming of France30歲，母親Guri of Alba28歲。她於1059年與King Donald Bane III, of Scotland在英國蘇格蘭安格斯雷斯可比結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1100年在蘇格蘭享年60歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭阿吉爾。

zh-hans.Rescobie, Angus, Scotland: 英国苏格兰安格斯雷斯可比
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Hextilda fitz Andlaw of Perth于1040年出生在苏格兰培爾培斯时，她的父亲Andlaw Fitz Hemming of France30岁，母亲Guri of Alba28岁。她于1059年与King Donald Bane III, of Scotland在英国苏格兰安格斯雷斯可比结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1100年在苏格兰享年60岁，埋葬在苏格兰阿吉爾。

nameMeanings.name: fitz
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Either a short form of any of the numerous names representing a transferred use of a surname formed with the Anglo-Norman French prefix fi(t)z ‘son of ’, as for example Fitzgerald , Fitzroy , or a transferred use of the surname Fitz, which may be of the same derivation, but applied originally to distinguish a son from a father bearing the same given name, or a local name from Fitz in Shropshire, named with the Old English personal name Fitt + hōh ‘hill spur’.

nameMeanings.name: of
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of Oswald or any of the various other names beginning with Os-.

nameMeanings.name: Perth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Manfred, Beate, Horst, Siegfried, Uwe, Volker.

variants.name: Port
meanings: English: from Middle English port(e) ‘gateway, entrance’ (Old French porte, from Latin porta), hence a topographic name for someone who lived near the gates of a fortified town or city, or for the gatekeeper. Compare Porter 1.

English: topographic name for someone who lived near a harbor or in a market town, from a homonymous Middle English port(e) (Old English port ‘harbor, market town’, from Latin portus ‘harbor, haven’, reinforced in Middle English by Old French port, from the same source).
English (of Norman origin): habitational name from Port‐en‐Bessin (Calvados), which is recorded as Portu in 1035–36. The placename derives from Latin portus ‘port, harbour, haven’.

en.lifeSummary: When Hextilda fitz Andlaw of Perth was born in 1040, in Perth, Perthshire, Scotland, her father, Andlaw Fitz Hemming of France, was 30 and her mother, Guri of Alba, was 28. She married King Donald Bane III, of Scotland in 1059, in Rescobie, Angus, Scotland, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. She died in 1100, in Scotland, at the age of 60, and was buried in Argyll, Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Hextilda fitz Andlaw of Perth est née en 1040, à Perth, Perthshire, Écosse, son père, Andlaw Fitz Hemming of France, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Guri of Alba, avait 28 ans. Elle a épousé King Donald Bane III, of Scotland en 1059, à Rescobie, Angus, Écosse, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1100, à Écosse, à l’âge de 60 ans, et a été enterrée à Argyll, Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als Hextilda fitz Andlaw of Perth 1040 in Perth, Perthshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Andlaw Fitz Hemming of France 30 und ihre Mutter Guri of Alba 28. Sie hat 1059 in Rescobie, Angus, Schottland, United Kingdom King Donald Bane III, of Scotland geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1100 im Alter von 60 Jahren in Scotland und wurde in Argyll, Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Hextilda fitz Andlaw of Perth è nata il nel 1040 nel Perth, Perthshire, Scotland, sua padre, Andlaw Fitz Hemming of France, aveva 30 anni e sua madre, Guri of Alba, aveva 28 anni. Lei sposato King Donald Bane III, of Scotland nel 1059, nel Rescobie, Angus, Scozia, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1100, nel Scotland, all'età di 60 anni, e fu sepolta a Argyll, Scotland.

ja.,Scotland: イギリススコットランド
ja.Rescobie, Angus, Scotland: イギリススコットランドアンガスレスコビ
ja.Perth, Perthshire, Scotland: スコットランドペルスシュアイアペルス
ja.Scotland, United Kingdom: イギリススコットランド
ja.St. Oran's Chapel Cemetery-the Reilig Ou: スコットランドアルグイル
ja.lifeSummary: Hextilda fitz Andlaw of Perthが1040年にスコットランドペルスシュアイアペルスで生まれた時，父Andlaw Fitz Hemming of Franceは30歳，母Guri of Albaは28歳であった。1059年にイギリススコットランドアンガスレスコビでKing Donald Bane III, of Scotlandと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1100年にスコットランドで60歳で死去し，スコットランドアルグイルにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Hextilda fitz Andlaw of Perth(이)가 1040년 스컷랜드 퍼스실르 퍼스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Andlaw Fitz Hemming of France(은)는 30세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Guri of Alba(은)는 28세였다. 그녀는 1059년 영국 스코틀랜드 앤구스 레스컵이에서 King Donald Bane III, of Scotland(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1100년 스컷랜드에서 60세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드 아그이에 묻혔다.

mn.Rescobie, Angus, Scotland: Rescobie, Aonghas, Шотланд, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Hextilda fitz Andlaw of Perth nasceu em 1040, em Perth, Perthshire, Scotland, seu pai, Andlaw Fitz Hemming of France, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Guri of Alba, tinha 28 anos. Ela casou-se com King Donald Bane III, of Scotland em 1059, em Rescobie, Angus, Escócia, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 1100, em Scotland, com 60 anos, e foi sepultada em Argyll, Scotland.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Hextilda fitz Andlaw of Perth родилась в 1040 г. в местности пирт, пиртшир, Шотландия, её отцу по имени Andlaw Fitz Hemming of France было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Guri of Alba, 28. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени King Donald Bane III, of Scotland в 1059 г. в местности рескоби, ангус, Шотландия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1100 г. в местности Шотландия в возрасте 60 лет и была похоронена в местности аргилл, Шотландия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Hextilda fitz Andlaw of Perth nació en 1040, en Perth, Perthshire, Scotland, su papá, Andlaw Fitz Hemming of France, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Guri of Alba, tenía 28 años. Se casó con King Donald Bane III, of Scotland en 1059, en Rescobie, Angus, Escocia, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1100, en Scotland, a la edad de 60 años, y fue sepultada en Argyll, Scotland.
